input: Run scope guard on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected scope guard output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the scope guard workflow

input: Apply scope guard to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive scope guard analysis with evidence-tagged findings
Skill activates with minimal input, applies reasonable defaults

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to scope guard
